name: GH_GeometricGoo<T>
summary: Abstract base implementation of IGH_GeometricGoo. If you implement IGH_GeometricGoo, use this for a booster.

constructors.name: GH_GeometricGoo<T>()
constructors.summary: Blank constructor, m_value will be set to default (null for reference types, zeroes for value types)

constructors.name: GH_GeometricGoo<T>(T)
constructors.summary: Data constructor, m_value will be set to internal_data.

params.name: internal_data
params.doc: Value to store inside this Goo instance.

methods.name: CastFrom
methods.summary: Attempt a cast from generic object.
methods.remarks: If False, the contents of this instance are not to be trusted.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: CastTo<Q>(Q)
methods.signature: public override bool CastTo<Q>(out Q target)
methods.summary: Attempt a cast to type T.
methods.remarks: If false, the target instance contents are not guaranteed to be valid.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: CastTo<Q>(Q)
methods.signature: public virtual bool CastTo<Q>(ref Q target)
methods.summary: Attempt a cast to type Q.
methods.remarks: If false, the target instance contents are not guaranteed to be valid.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ClearCaches
methods.summary: Clears all caches. Typically if the geometry is referenced, this will erase the local copy. If your T is a value-type, you must override this function and specifically unset the local value.

methods.name: Duplicate
methods.summary: Make a complete duplicate of this instance. No shallow copies.
methods.remarks: Classes which implement this interface should also provide type specific Duplicate methods

methods.name: DuplicateGeometry
methods.summary: Make a complete duplicate of this geometry. No shallow copies.
methods.remarks: Each class that implements this interface should also provide a type specific duplication method

methods.name: EmitProxy
methods.summary: Create a new proxy for this instance. Return Null if this class does not support proxies.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transformation to apply to geometry for BoundingBox computation.

returns.doc: The world aligned boundingbox of the transformed geometry.

methods.name: LoadGeometry()
methods.summary: If the geometry is referenced and currently unloaded, forces loading of the geometry. Not all IGH_GeometricGoo implementations support referenced geometry.

methods.name: LoadGeometry(RhinoDoc)
methods.summary: If the geometry is referenced and currently unloaded, forces loading of the geometry. Not all IGH_GeometricGoo implementations support referenced geometry. The default is to always return True.

methods.name: Morph
methods.summary: Morph the object or a deformable representation of the object.

returns.doc: Deformed geometry. If the local geometry can be deformed accurately, then the returned instance equals this instance. Not all geometry types can be accurately deformed though, if this is the case, this function will return an instance of another IGH_GeometricGoo derived type which can be deformed.

methods.name: Read
methods.summary: Default behaviour is to return True.

methods.name: ScriptVariable
methods.summary: This function will be called when the local IGH_Goo instance disappears into a user Script. This would be an excellent place to cast your IGH_Goo type to a simple data type.

returns.doc: The default implementation of this function returns the Value instance.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Creates a string description of the current instance value.

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transforms the object or a deformable representation of the object.

returns.doc: Transformed geometry. If the local geometry can be transformed accurately, then the returned instance equals this instance. Not all geometry types can be accurately transformed under all circumstances though, if this is the case, this function will return an instance of another IGH_GeometricGoo derived type which can be transformed.

methods.name: Write
methods.summary: Default behaviour is to return True.

properties.name: Boundingbox
properties.summary: Gets the boundingbox for this geometry.

properties.name: IsGeometryLoaded
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this geometry is currently loaded (assuming it is referenced). Not all IGH_GeometricGoo implementations support referenced geometry. The default is to always return True.

properties.name: IsReferencedGeometry
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this geometry is referenced. Not all IGH_GeometricGoo implementations support referenced geometry.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the current value is valid.

properties.name: IsValidWhyNot
properties.summary: Gets a string describing the state of "invalidness". If the instance is valid, then this property should return Nothing or String.Empty.

properties.name: ReferenceID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Guid of the object that is referenced. Not all IGH_GeometricGoo implementations support referenced geometry. The default implementation is to always return Guid.Empty.

properties.name: TypeDescription
properties.summary: Gets a description of the type of the implementation.

properties.name: TypeName
properties.summary: Gets the name of the type of the implementation.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: Gets or sets the value of this type. Note that if the type has a ReferenceID this value might get destroyed in the future.
